'''鈭歵-t-g-th''' ('''katatgethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bran|bran]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-t-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bran|bran]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-t-g-th
|-
! Lemma
| katatgethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitatgethoko|thitatgethoko]] || [[word:jitatgethoko|jitatgethoko]] || [[word:shitatgethoko|shitatgethoko]] || [[word:kitatgethoko|kitatgethoko]]
|-

|-
